# isAccessRestrictedAppleDevice

**Instance Property**

A Boolean value indicating whether the device is an Apple device, passcode-locked, and connected to an untrusted host.

## Declaration

```swift
var isAccessRestrictedAppleDevice: Bool { get }
```

## Detecting Apple Devices

- **iCloudPhotosEnabled**: A Boolean value indicating whether the iCloud Photo Library is enabled on the device.

items.description: A Boolean value indicating whether the iCloud Photo Library is enabled on the device.
